canonical_source: This repository is the canonical source of truth. Installed copies under ~/.codex/skills are outputs or synced mirrors.

skills.name: pdf
skills.description: PDF parsing, generation, and rendering-aware review workflows.
dependency_notes: Optional MinerU API token for primary parsing path.
Poppler utilities for visual PDF rendering checks.

skills.name: report-download
skills.description: Official-source-first A-share and Hong Kong listed company report downloads.
dependency_notes: Requires Python plus uv for the preferred workflow.
Uses network access to official report hosts.

skills.name: git-commit
skills.description: Conventional-commit oriented git commit workflow guidance.
dependency_notes: No extra runtime files beyond the skill document.

skills.name: jupyter-notebook
skills.description: Notebook scaffolding with templates, references, and helper scripts.
dependency_notes: Scaffold script uses Python stdlib only.
Optional Jupyter runtime packages are needed for local execution.

skills.name: frontend-slides
skills.description: Zero-dependency HTML presentation skill with presets, references, and PPT extraction script.
dependency_notes: The skill relies on companion markdown and CSS files that must remain beside SKILL.md.
